Incident: Bumped at the start. Sent for sampling post-race.
Near the 400 Metres was shifted to the outside of TIN FOOK to improve. Approaching the 350 Metres AEROVOLANIC became unbalanced when it made contact with EVERYONE’S STAR which lay in.
From a wide barrier was shifted across behind runners in the early stages.
Raced very wide and without cover for the majority of the event.
On jumping made contact with the left side of the starting gate. Shortly after URANUS STAR bumped with ALL’S WELL.

J Moreira reported that his mount lay in when placed under pressure in the Home Straight and its run ended near the 150 Metres where it commenced to give ground. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
L Ferraris reported that his mount was not comfortable on the "Yielding” track conditions.
Jumped only fairly. After the 1300 Metres made contact with DREAMING TOGETHER and raced tight to the inside of that runner.

A Atzeni reported that he was instructed to go forward. He said TIN FOOK raced wide and without cover for the majority of the event and failed to run out the 1400 Metres on the "Yielding” track. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.

Bounded on jumping and lost ground. A Badel stated that his mount was able to obtain a position behind midfield where it travelled satisfactorily. He said under pressure in the Home Straight GHORGAN failed to respond to his riding. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
Bumped at the start. E Brown stated that the instructions were to be handy but after being caught wide in the early stages he allowed his mount to stride forward to avoid covering additional ground.

The performance of WITHOUT RHYME, which finished tailed out, was considered unacceptable. Before being allowed to race again, WITHOUT RHYME will be required to perform to the satisfaction of the Stewards in a barrier trial and be subjected to an official veterinary examination. A veterinary inspection immediately following the race did not show any significant findings.
